webpage.para: This site is about a powerfull web publishing framework called SilkPage. Web publishing tools are certainly plentiful and have been available for a long time but sadly none of them met our requirements and design goals.

section.title: Mission
section.para: We came together to develop an outstanding Web Publishing Framework built around XML markup languages and Web Standards. Do you want to participate?

section.title: Acknowledgements
section.para: We would like to thank the many people who've visited this Web site and sent us bits of information.
